changeSet.author: restaurant-saas
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO users (id, username, password, email, is_active, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ( '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000002', 'testwaiter', crypt('Test1234!', gen_salt('bf')), 'testwaiter@example.com', TRUE, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP );
INSERT INTO user_roles (user_id, role_id) SELECT '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000002', r.id FROM roles r WHERE r.name = 'WAITER';
